pr.title: Record: Per-Order Adaptive Alpha + N-gram Backoff (val_bpb=0.2995, 3-seed)

output.summary: Combines two-phase shared global n-gram cache with per-order entropy-adaptive alpha, pre-enrichment confidence signals, and GPU-resident EMA.
techniques: Per-order entropy centers/weights for adaptive backoff alpha
Pre-enrichment confidence signal modulates n-gram trust
GPU-resident EMA plus GELU pre-enrichment with SmearGate/BigramHash
